+{

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kong: [keyauth] Add auto expiration to keys",
+    "description": "[keyauth] Add auto expiration to keys. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kong deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kong version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong\nhelm list -n kong 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kong installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kong configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kong configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong\nkubectl get configmap -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kong\n```\nFor example, to auto-expire in `2d` or `1y` since the creation date."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [keyauth] Add auto expiration to keys",
+        "description": "I am glad to close this PR now on behalf of  who fixed it by submitting a PR #4984. It took some four and half years to get this in, but we finally did, ;-). Perhaps it was worth the wait, like all the good stuff. It feels better if it just doesn't come given. Haha... well thanks again ! Closing this now.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong\nkubectl get events -n kong --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[keyauth] Add auto expiration to keys\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I am glad to close this PR now on behalf of  who fixed it by submitting a PR #4984. It took some four and half years to get this in, but we finally did, ;-). Perhaps it was worth the wait, like all the good stuff. It feels better if it just doesn't come given. Haha... well thanks again ! Closing this now.",

+    }
